# Firmware binaries (local builds)

`.bin` files are **gitignored**. After a local build, artifacts land here or under `upstream/Ender3V2S1/.pio/build/STM32F103RE_creality/`.

Suggested copy name for the current beta profile:

`Duender-422-BLTUBL-MPC-T13-CoreXY.bin`

See [docs/beta.md](../docs/beta.md) for version, flash steps, and caveats.
